description: Finalize partner-key creation by proving domain ownership. Fetches /.well-known/openfederation-partner.json from every allowed origin and verifies the JSON contains the previously-issued verification token. On success, the partner key is marked 'verified' and becomes usable for registration.

main.description: Verify domain ownership for a pending partner key. Admin-only.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing id, key has no allowed origins, or key is already revoked.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: No partner key with the given id.

errors.name: VerificationFailed
errors.description: One or more allowed origins failed domain-ownership verification. See `results` in the response body for per-origin reasons.

id.description: UUID of the partner key returned by partner.createKey.

verifiedOrigins.description: Origins that passed verification (returned on success).

alreadyVerified.description: True if the key was already verified before this call.
